title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
hints: Create an array to store the length of LIS ending at each index.
For each element, check all previous elements.
If current element is greater than a previous element, update the LIS length.
Initialize all LIS lengths to 1 (each element is a subsequence of length 1).
The answer is the maximum value in the LIS lengths array.
Time complexity is O(n^2) where n is the length of the array.
